custom-property-pattern.message: CSS custom properties must use the ecz- prefix (e.g. --ecz-color-surface).

selector-class-pattern.message: Class names must use the ecz- prefix (e.g. .ecz-btn, .ecz-card__media, .ecz-btn--primary).

declaration-no-important.message: !important is banned. Use @layer client to override cleanly.
